name: Executive Summary
description: Concise 1-pager deck for busy executives following pyramid principle

slides.title: [Your Key Message]
slides.subtitle: [Context | Date | Author]
slides.notes: Lead with the conclusion - what decision or understanding should the audience walk away with?

slides.title: [Problem or Opportunity]
slides.notes: Set context quickly. Quantify impact wherever possible.

slides.title: [Analysis Summary]
slides.notes: 3-5 bullet points maximum. Use data to support claims. Consider a chart.

slides.title: [Recommendation]
slides.notes: Be explicit about what you're asking for. Include trade-offs if relevant.

slides.title: [Next Steps]
slides.notes: Make it actionable. Who does what by when?

usage_tips: Keep total presentation to 5 slides maximum
Use BLUF (Bottom Line Up Front) approach
Lead each slide with the conclusion
Include clear ask on recommendation slide
